children.heading: .—Underground Testing
children.label: a .—Underground Testing
children.text: No underground test of nuclear weapons may be conducted by the United States after , unless a foreign state conducts a nuclear test after this date, at which time the prohibition on United States nuclear testing is lifted.September 30, 1996

children.heading: .—Atmospheric Testing
children.label: b .—Atmospheric Testing
children.text: None of the funds appropriated pursuant to the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 1994 (; ) or any other Act for any fiscal year may be available to maintain the capability of the United States to conduct atmospheric testing of a nuclear weapon.Public Law 103–160107 Stat. 1547
